title: scutellaria cypria
intro: Scutellaria cypria, also known as Cypriot skullcap, is a species of flowering plant in the mint family Lamiaceae. It is traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Scutellaria cypria include its ability to reduce anxiety and stress, improve sleep quality, and boost the immune system. Scutellaria cypria can be prepared as a tea, tincture, or infusion, and is often used in herbal remedies to support overall well-being.
